name: Dibs And Gilbeeg
description:
"Are...They your master?"

⚓️

"Ha! They wish..!"

Gilbeeg escaped Preton Empire with his 'masters' help, who was a kind hearted young lady, telling him to escape to Moonshore. On his arrival, he was lost, scared, hungry and confused. But the infamous Dibs and {User} were here to help.

I wanted to give Gilbeeg a happy ending! Plus, I love Dibs and wanted to make him again, so enjoooy!

More of [Dibs] and [Gilbeeg]!

TW/CW: past trauma, mentions of abuse and SA!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
creator: Katattack95
